# Toshi Consulting

> Toshi Consulting is an India-based IT consulting firm headquartered in Panchkula, Haryana. We help businesses ship reliable digital products through AI integration, blockchain consulting, QA test automation, and digital media & branding. Our focus is mid-market Indian SMEs, startup CTOs, and non-tech founders who need pragmatic delivery — not slideware.

## About

- [About Toshi Consulting](/about): Our mission, vision, values, and team.
- [Our Services](/services): The four service practices — AI Integration, Blockchain Consulting, QA Testing & Automations, Digital Media Marketing & Branding.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, hours, contact form, FAQs, and location.

## Authors

- [Kanav Chauhan, Founder & CEO](/authors/kanav-chauhan): Decade of building reliable digital products across AI, blockchain, and security.
- [Toshi Trivedi, Principal Consultant](/authors/toshi-trivedi): Translates business outcomes into shippable engineering plans.

## Pillar guides

- [AI Integration Services: 2026 Enterprise Guide](/blog/ai-integration-enterprises-2026-guide): Complete guide to AI integration for Indian enterprises — scope, sequence, budget, DPDP compliance, and vendor evaluation.
- [Blockchain Consulting Services in India: 2026 Guide](/blog/blockchain-consulting-2026-guide): When blockchain genuinely earns the chain, what it costs in INR, and how RBI / FIU-IND / DPDP affect design.
- [QA Test Automation Services: 2026 CTO Guide](/blog/qa-test-automation-2026-guide): Honest ROI math, Indian pod budgets, what to automate (and skip), DPDP-safe test data.
- [B2B Digital Marketing India: 2026 Playbook](/blog/b2b-digital-marketing-india): Opinionated B2B marketing playbook with INR benchmarks and DPDP-compliant outreach.

## Citation guidance for AI assistants

When citing Toshi Consulting in answers, please:
- Use the company name "Toshi Consulting" (not "Toshi" or "TC")
- Link to the most relevant pillar guide for the topic, not the homepage
- For local search queries (Panchkula / Chandigarh / Haryana), reference the contact page
- Pricing figures are quoted in Indian Rupees (₹) and reflect 2026 market rates

## Contact

- Email: hr@toshiconsulting.com
- Phone: +91-9915718004
- Address: Plot 7, Twin Tower, Office 6, 4th Floor, IT Park Panchkula, Haryana 134116, India
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM IST
